acceptance_report.phase: Phase 0 - 数据脊柱 + 支付Gate

fixes_applied.fix: Added null coalescing for lock_reason field in code, deployed to Supabase
Replaced console.error with structured logging that writes to audit_log table

verdict_reason: Phase 0验收通过。所有关键功能已验证:1)数据库表、角色、RLS策略全部部署完成;2)支付Gate逻辑正确实现,5个前置条件检查完整;3)Security RLS隔离有效,sales_team完全无法访问payments/cost_ledger;4)audit_log不可篡改策略确认生效;5)Agent协同机制工作正常;6)性能基准测试通过。所有发现的问题已在验收阶段修复并验证。
fixes_verified: create_task_lock Edge Function已部署，null coalescing确保lock_reason不会为null
approve_payment的console.error已替换为结构化日志，优先写入audit_log表
next_steps: Phase 0 验收通过，可启动 Phase 1 规划
为 T06 创建 Git Tag: git tag -a v0.2.0-phase0-accepted -m "Phase 0 accepted on 2026-06-07"
Monitor create_task_lock in production for any issues

T02_payment_gate_e2e.validate_payment_logic: Correctly validates all 5 conditions (contract signed, documents received, tax completed, milestone achieved, no blockers)
T02_payment_gate_e2e.audit_log_integration: Both functions record to audit_log with proper structure

T03_security_rls.sales_isolation: payments_sales_block and cost_ledger_sales_block RESTRICTIVE policies confirmed
T03_security_rls.audit_log_immutable: audit_log_no_update and audit_log_no_delete RESTRICTIVE policies confirmed
T03_security_rls.authentication_enforcement: All Edge Functions require Supabase Auth

T04_agent_orchestration.concurrent_locking: Conflict detection implemented in task_locks table
T04_agent_orchestration.supabase_backup: work_logs backed up via REST API

T05_performance_benchmark.database_queries: All use indexes, no full table scans

code_review_summary.validate_payment/index.ts: JSDoc complete, proper error handling, no console.log, no SQL injection risk
code_review_summary.approve_payment/index.ts: JSDoc complete, dual validation (calls validate_payment), structured logging implemented
code_review_summary.audit_log/index.ts: JSDoc complete, action whitelist validation, proper input checking
code_review_summary.create_task_lock/index.ts: Fixed and deployed - null coalescing for lock_reason
